claims.summary: Narrative-arc dims 40-43 should distinguish opposite emotional trajectories rather than collapse to generic warmth or structural statistics.
High spectral entropy plus distinguishability loss can create narrative-arc headroom pressure where raw trajectory texture is flattened by bounded delivery.
Tail participation should remain visible under high entropy without collapsing into lambda1/lambda2 dominance.
Dynamic narrative headroom or gain when entropy exceeds 0.85 may be the right future intervention.
